cuts.video_prompt: No background music. NO BGM. NO score. SFX only. RUNTIME: 6 seconds. CAMERA: ARRI ALEXA Mini LF, ZEISS, anamorphic 2.39:1. TIME: 4:58 AM, deep pre-dawn blue. CHARACTER: RAE, hand only, same identity as reference. SHOT GROUP — 6 SECOND SEQUENCE: BEGINS WITH (0:00-0:01) clock digits glowing in darkness. ACTION (0:01-0:04) her hand reaches in slowly, hovers above the button. TRANSITION (0:04-0:05) finger presses down, light dims. ENDS WITH (0:05-0:06) digits go dark, match-cut out on the blackout. LIGHT: cold blue practical glow only, deep negative fill. SFX: soft click, faint blinds rattle.
